default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Introduce growthx.ai's AI-driven content creation services to potential clients Seema Kumar and Mat Rider.](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [growthx.ai offers end-to-end AI-powered content strategy and creation, focusing on editorial content with potential for programmatic scaling](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [Their process involves a detailed strategy sprint to create AI-ready artifacts, followed by ongoing content production (5-15+ articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [The platform uses hundreds of AI workflows to accelerate content creation, with human oversight for quality control](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=517.0)
  - [Pricing ranges from $9k-$25k+/month, with an initial $20k-$30k strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=729.0)

## Topics

### growthx.ai Overview

  - [Former in-house marketers who've built content programs](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=163.0)
  - [Focused on creating AI-driven workflows for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Offer both a platform and services, with emphasis on end-to-end support](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [Team includes strategy layer (growth/SEO experts) and editorial focus (e.g., managing editors)](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=312.0)

### Content Strategy Approach

  - [Start with "content strategy foundation" before addressing lower-funnel tactics](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=397.0)
  - [Focus on speaking to the right people at scale, developing voice/tone](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=426.0)
  - [Create long-form content (blogs, unique experiences) to dial in strategy](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=442.0)
  - [Can expand to programmatic opportunities, email, lead magnets, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)

### Engagement Structure

  - [Begin with 8-week "strategy sprint" to develop AI-ready artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=526.0)
  - [Deep-dive into customer knowledge, personas, technical details](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=566.0)
  - [Create roadmap and establish "definition of done"](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Transition to ongoing content production (5-15+ articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### AI-Ready Artifacts

  - [Detailed briefs on company, personas, jobs-to-be-done](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=796.0)
  - [In-depth persona/archetype analysis](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=839.0)
  - [Comprehensive writing guidelines (voice, tone, structure)](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Content rewrites with explanations to align with guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - ["Content OS" in Airtable for topic/keyword clustering and assignment tracking](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Platform Capabilities

  - [Integrates AI-ready artifacts into workflows](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1373.0)
  - [Multiple "pipelines" for different content use cases (e.g., refreshing, growth, article generation)](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)
  - [Leverages various APIs (e.g., SEMrush, ChatGPT) for data and insights](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1489.0)
  - [Custom workflow engine with coding agent for rapid workflow creation](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
  - [AI shortcuts for content refinement (e.g., tone adjustment, conciseness)](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1667.0)

### Pricing and Deliverables

  - [Strategy sprint: $20k-$30k (typically closer to $20k)](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1729.0)
  - [Ongoing execution: $9k-$25k+ per month](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Low end ($9k): \~5 articles/week](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1771.0)
  - [High end ($25k+): 15+ articles, programmatic pages, custom workflows](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1776.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to send examples of technical content (e.g., cybersecurity) by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1809.0)
  - [Seema and Mat to review technical content examples](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
  - [Potential follow-up discussion on suitability for Seema's technical security client](https://fathom.video/share/HDsS-2-CR42cuKgtBLFEHydh73QRbuvQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1806.0)
